title: Citrusy Light Indulgent Croatian Tofu Stir-fry
description: A light and indulgent citrusy dish featuring air-fried tofu with a dash-friendly combination of herbs and spices to complement its smooth texture.
instructions: Prepare the tofu by air-frying until golden brown and crispy.
Dice the onion into small pieces and mince the garlic.
Add olive oil to a pan over medium heat, then add diced onion. Sauté for about 3 minutes or until softened.
Stir in minced garlic and red pepper flakes, cooking for another minute.
Add fresh lemon juice, lemon zest, and chopped cilantro. Stir well to combine all ingredients evenly.
Pour in the half cup of lemon juice from the block of tofu, mix thoroughly, and bring to a simmer.
Fold in the air-fried tofu cubes, ensuring they are fully coated with the sauce mixture.
Simmer for 2-3 minutes until thickened and nicely absorbed by the tofu. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
